notes:
1. Scope and delivery summary
- Delivered full request scope: docs/CONCEPTS.md, docs/QUICKSTART.md, docs/INTEGRATION.md, docs/TROUBLESHOOTING.md, plus legacy workpacks/ADOPTION_GUIDE.md removal and reference migration.
- V1 integration evidence confirms AC1-AC12 pass, including diagram coverage, troubleshooting entry structure/count, cross-links, and no broken docs links.

Metrics
| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Total prompts | 7 planned / 7 completed (A0-A4, V1, R1) |
| First-pass completions | 7 |
| B-series count | 0 |
| Total elapsed time | 1d 17h 20m wall-clock (2026-02-24T00:05:00Z -> 2026-02-25T17:25:00Z); 59m 44s active execution (A0-A4, V1) |

2. What went well
- A-series prompts delivered all documentation artifacts without B-series corrective prompts.
- Dependency/DAG ordering was respected, and the V1 gate passed with complete acceptance evidence.
- Cross-document linking and legacy-guide removal were verified together with tooling checks.

3. What caused friction
- Initial bootstrap was temporarily blocked by unresolved requires_workpack dependencies and required a documented exception.
- Integration verification required explicit artifact/state/commit alignment before final pass.
- Commit verifier path truncation warnings and zeroed execution telemetry reduced verification/estimation signal quality.

4. Defects and rework analysis
- Defects requiring B-series: none (B-series count = 0).
- Rework class: process alignment only (artifact/state/commit reconciliation in V1), not content defects in documentation deliverables.
- Estimated rework overhead: approximately one V1 verification cycle (~25 minutes) to close alignment gaps.

5. Estimation accuracy (planned vs actual)
| Prompt | Planned | Actual | Assessment |
|--------|---------|--------|------------|
| A0_bootstrap | XS | 5m | Accurate |
| A1_concepts_guide | M | 5m 14s | Over-estimated |
| A2_quickstart_guide | S | 8m | Under run within planned band |
| A3_integration_guide | M | 7m 30s | Over-estimated |
| A4_troubleshooting_guide | S | 9m | Under run within planned band |
| V1_integration_meta | S | 25m | Accurate |
- Overall: documentation authoring prompts were frequently over-estimated (M-sized work completed in under 10 minutes each), while verification/alignment consumed proportionally more time.

6. Action items with owners
- AI-1: Capture non-zero execution telemetry (tokens/duration) during output generation. Owner: agent tooling maintainers.
- AI-2: Reduce false warnings in commit verification when long paths are truncated by git show --stat. Owner: tooling maintainers.
- AI-3: Require started_at for every prompt status entry to improve elapsed-time analytics. Owner: protocol maintainers.
- AI-4: Add a pre-flight dependency readiness check in bootstrap workflows to reduce initial blocking churn. Owner: prompt/template maintainers.
- AI-5: Recalibrate documentation prompt estimates (default M -> S) for future planning cycles. Owner: workpack planners.

Commit SHA handling
- This prompt updates tracked artifacts, so artifacts.commit_shas is intentionally non-empty. It references the latest verified branch commit (6602f22); R1 file changes are currently uncommitted in the working tree.
